intent: The platform extends its reach to a new team — from this point, they provision and manage their own landing zones.
steps: Collect from the user: application name, owner email, and engineer email.

Confirm the values with the user, then trigger the workflow: gh workflow run requestNew-Application-Profile.yml -f ApplicationName="{AppName}" -f OwnerContact="{ownerEmail}" -f engineerContact="{engineerEmail}" — this raises a pull request.
A platform engineer reviews and approves the pull request — approval is what triggers the automation to complete provisioning.
